div.head:
No. 454
Editorial Note
div.p: In a note of July 1, the Embassy in Israel informed the Israeli Government that the latter had been declared eligible to receive reimbursable military assistance under section 408(e) of the Mutual Defense Assistance Act of 1949, as amended, provided the necessary assurances required by the Act were forthcoming. In a note of July 23, the Israeli Government gave the necessary assurances, and the agreement entered into force on July 23. For text of the notes exchanged, see 3 UST (pt. 4) 4985.
